description: IN2U for Him by calvin klein is a fragrance that has notes of lime, gin fizz, grapefruit leaves, tangelo, pimento, shisco, cocoa, vetiver, cedar and musk. A silvery fragrance in a delectable flacon with plastic encasing, this fragrance is a love-forever classicQuantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
